title: Digital Self Story Triple
description: A story, accomplishment, or lesson from a person's life. The universal building block of digital identity.

proud.description: Why this matters -- the significance, the pride

era.description: Named era of life (e.g. early, high-school, javelin, enterprise, metal)

category.description: What kind of entry this is

date.description: When it happened. YYYY, ~YYYY (approximate), YYYY-MM-DD, or null if unknown

tags.description: Free-form tags for filtering and discovery

featured.description: true = shows on curated identity page, false = timeline only
